message:
refactor: migrate panic! to unreachable! in claim_compiler match arms, unwrap() to expect() in deterministic_seed tests, remove unused MAX_EVENTS const

claim_compiler: replace 8 panic!("expected compiled/both compiled") calls
with unreachable!() in test match arms where the branch indicates a test
logic error rather than an expected failure path.

deterministic_seed: replace 10 unwrap() calls with expect() providing
descriptive messages across ContentHash::from_hex, serialization round-trip,
and config round-trip test methods.

dgis_migration_gate: remove unused MAX_EVENTS constant (dead code cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
